{{CargoRelic
|name=Microcosm Chronicles
|class_id=20825
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=These extensive notes were left behind by a microscopic civilization that originated within the refrigerator. They cover various fields, including life form modification, cloning technology, and molecular biology. Among them is a segment on killer clone analysis, accompanied by the note: "Weakness analysis completed, no longer formidable..."
|fame=17
|art=11
|fth=12
|civ=15
|tech=33
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Greatly boost Snail Power in Hitman Challenges
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Greatly boost Snail Power in Hitman Challenges
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Greatly boost Snail Power in Hitman Challenges
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Greatly boost Snail Power in Hitman Challenges
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Greatly boost Snail Power in Hitman Challenges<br> (Awakened)
}}
